mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SigninUser (id, user_name, department_id,role_id, activity_name,status) VALUES (#{user.id},#{user.username},#{user.departmentId},#{user.roleId},#{activityName},0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SigninUser WHERE activity_name = #{activityName}
select status from SigninUser where id = #{id} AND activity_name = #{activityName}
